overview.tagline: A quiet, family-centered borough nestled along the New York border
overview.description: Northvale is a small, residential borough in the northernmost section of Bergen County, situated directly on the New York State border. With a population just under 5,000, Northvale maintains a quiet, suburban character that appeals to families seeking excellent schools and a safe, low-key community. The borough is part of the Northern Valley Regional High School District and benefits from proximity to the Palisades Interstate Parkway and Garden State Parkway for easy commuting.
overview.schoolDistrict: Northvale Public Schools / Northern Valley Regional
highlights: Quiet residential community on the New York State border
Access to the excellent Northern Valley Regional High School District
Proximity to Palisades Interstate Parkway for outdoor recreation
Low crime rate and safe neighborhoods
Convenient access to Garden State Parkway and Route 303

realEstate.assessmentInfo: Properties assessed by the Borough Tax Assessor. Bergen County conducts periodic revaluations to align assessed values with current market conditions.
realEstate.recentTrends: Northvale's housing market has seen consistent appreciation driven by demand from families attracted to the Northern Valley school district. The market is competitive with limited inventory. Homes near the borough center and schools are particularly sought after.
neighborhoodNotes: Livingston Street area — Central residential neighborhood near schools and borough services
Paris Avenue corridor — Quiet streets with single-family homes
Tappan Road section — Properties near the New York border
Piermont Road area — Mix of residential and commercial near the borough's main road

trashCollection.title: Trash Collection
trashCollection.description: Curbside trash collection is provided by a contracted hauler for the Borough.
details: Trash pickup occurs twice per week
Containers must be at curbside by 6:00 AM
Use approved containers with secure lids, maximum 50 lbs
Bulk item pickup available by scheduling with DPW
Holiday schedule posted on the borough website

recycling.title: Recycling
recycling.description: Curbside recycling collected on a regular schedule.
details: Commingled recyclables collected biweekly
Paper and cardboard on alternate weeks
Yard waste collected seasonally
Recycling containers provided by the Borough
Special collection events held periodically

waterSewer.title: Water & Sewer
waterSewer.description: Water is provided by Veolia Water. Sewer service is managed by the Borough and the Northwest Bergen County Utilities Authority.
details: Veolia Water (formerly United Water) handles water supply and billing
Sewer maintained by the Borough and NBCUA
Water quality reports available annually
Emergency water service available 24/7 through Veolia
Sewer connection permits required for new construction

permits.title: Building & Permits
permits.description: The Building Department handles construction permits, zoning, and code enforcement.
details: Permits required for all construction, additions, and renovations
Zoning Board of Adjustment reviews variance applications
Applications available at Borough Hall
Inspections coordinated through the Building Department
Certificate of occupancy required for new construction

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: Borough manages street parking and municipal lots.
details: Street parking subject to posted restrictions
Commuter parking available near bus stops
Overnight parking restrictions enforced
Snow emergency parking rules in effect during storms
Parking violations subject to fines

additionalServices.title: Northvale Public Library
additionalServices.description: Small community library serving borough residents with books, programs, and digital resources.
details: Located at 116 Paris Avenue
Children's story times and summer reading programs
Free Wi-Fi and computer access
Part of the Bergen County Cooperative Library System (BCCLS)

noise.title: Noise Ordinance
noise.summary: Northvale enforces noise regulations to maintain the quiet character of its residential neighborhoods.
keyRules: Construction noise prohibited before 7:00 AM and after 7:00 PM weekdays
Saturday construction 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
No construction on Sundays or holidays
Power equipment restricted to daytime hours
Loud music prohibited after 10:00 PM

propertyMaintenance.title: Property Maintenance
propertyMaintenance.summary: Properties must be maintained to borough standards.
keyRules: Lawns must be kept mowed and maintained
Properties must be free of junk, debris, and abandoned vehicles
Structures must be in good repair
Sidewalks must be cleared of snow within 24 hours
Vacant lots must be maintained

pets.title: Pet Regulations
pets.summary: Pet owners must comply with licensing and leash laws.
keyRules: Dogs must be licensed annually
Dogs must be on a leash at all times off owner's property
Pet waste must be cleaned up immediately
Barking dogs subject to noise complaints
Maximum number of pets may be restricted

parking.title: Parking Regulations
parking.summary: Parking regulations are enforced to maintain safe streets.
keyRules: No overnight parking on streets from 2:00 AM to 6:00 AM
Vehicles must be moved during snow emergencies
No parking within 25 feet of intersections
Commercial vehicles restricted from residential streets overnight
Violations subject to fines and towing

rentals.title: Rental Property Regulations
rentals.summary: Rental properties must be registered and maintained per borough requirements.
keyRules: Rental properties must be registered with the Borough
Certificate of habitability required
Properties must meet all code and safety standards
Landlords responsible for property maintenance
Short-term rentals subject to local zoning

other.title: Tree Preservation
other.summary: The borough has regulations regarding removal of significant trees.
keyRules: Permit may be required for removing trees above a certain diameter
Replacement planting may be required
Shade Tree Commission advises on tree matters
Street trees maintained by the Borough

schools.publicDistrict: Northvale Public Schools / Northern Valley Regional High School District

publicSchools.name: Northvale Public School
publicSchools.notes: Borough's sole public school serving all K-8 students

publicSchools.name: Northern Valley Regional High School at Demarest
publicSchools.notes: Regional high school in Demarest serving Northvale students; consistently ranked among New Jersey's top public high schools

nearbyHigherEd: Ramapo College of New Jersey (Mahwah) — 15 miles

whyMoveHere: Access to top-ranked Northern Valley Regional High School at Demarest
Quiet, safe residential community with low crime
Proximity to Palisades Interstate Park and outdoor recreation
Convenient location near Garden State Parkway
Small-town atmosphere with strong community bonds

commuteToNYC.notes: NJ Transit bus service provides connections to the Port Authority Bus Terminal. Many residents drive to nearby Cresskill or Tenafly for bus service or use the Palisades Interstate Parkway and Route 9W to access the George Washington Bridge. Some commuters also drive to rail stations on the Pascack Valley Line.

costOfLiving.summary: Northvale is moderately priced for Bergen County, offering good value given the quality of the Northern Valley school district.
costOfLiving.vsStateAverage: Above the state average for housing and property taxes

pros: Excellent Northern Valley Regional High School
Very safe, quiet community with low crime
Proximity to hiking and nature in Palisades Interstate Park
Close to the New York State border for shopping and dining
cons: Very limited commercial activity — few local shops or restaurants
No train station — bus service is the primary transit option
Small community with limited entertainment options
Property taxes are high relative to home values
Some distance from Bergen County's larger towns and cultural amenities

restaurants.name: Biagio's Ristorante
restaurants.description: Family-owned Italian restaurant serving classic dishes in a warm, inviting setting.

restaurants.name: Northvale Classic Diner
restaurants.description: Traditional diner with a full menu of American breakfast and lunch favorites.

restaurants.name: Sushi X
restaurants.description: Japanese restaurant offering sushi, sashimi, and hibachi options.

parks.name: Hogan Field
parks.description: Borough park with sports fields, playground, and community gathering space.

parks.name: Veteran's Memorial Park
parks.description: Small memorial park honoring borough veterans.

parks.name: Palisades Interstate Park (nearby)
parks.description: Stunning cliffside park along the Hudson River offering hiking trails, scenic overlooks, and picnic areas.

events.name: Northvale Day
events.description: Annual community celebration with food, games, and live entertainment for the whole family.

events.name: Holiday Tree Lighting
events.description: Community tree lighting ceremony with refreshments and festive activities.

events.name: Memorial Day Ceremony
events.description: Borough ceremony honoring fallen service members at Veteran's Memorial Park.

attractions.name: Palisades Interstate Park
attractions.description: Major park along the Hudson River Palisades cliffs, offering hiking, picnicking, and stunning views of the Hudson Valley.

attractions.name: Tappan (NY) Historic District
attractions.description: Just across the state line, the historic hamlet of Tappan features Revolutionary War sites and charming shops.

shoppingAreas: Nearby Old Tappan and Nanuet (NY) shopping

government.meetingSchedule: Borough Council meets on the second and fourth Wednesday of each month at 7:30 PM

hospitals.name: Valley Hospital
hospitals.address: 223 North Van Dien Avenue, Ridgewood, NJ 07450
